title: Instudia conducts AI workshop for Beanstalk School students in Dimapur
description: Dimapur, June 15 (MExN): Students of Beanstalk School, Dimapur, participated in an interactive seminar on Artificial Intelligence (AI) organised by instudia on June 12, aimed at familiarising them with emerging technologies and their application in education.The workshop sought to demystify AI by demonstrating how students can use AI-powered tools as study assistants to enhance learning outcomes and improve productivity.Addressing the participants, instudia Director Daniel Changkija encouraged students to move beyond being passive users of technology and become active innovators and creators. He said the organisation's mission is to provide world-class technological exposure to the youth of Dimapur and prepare them for an increasingly automated future.The hands-on technical session was led by resource person Vishal Bardewa, who shared practical insights on balancing the use of AI tools with genuine skill development. He said responsible use of AI could help students save time on routine tasks and devote greater attention to creativity and critical thinking."AI isn't about replacing your brain; it's about upgrading your toolkit," Bardewa said, adding that AI tools can handle repetitive organisational tasks and basic research filtering, allowing students to focus on deeper and more meaningful learning.The seminar concluded with an interactive discussion and question-and-answer session, during which students explored the future of AI in creative industries and everyday life while also discussing issues related to data security, ethical technology and academic integrity.Organisers said the programme aimed to equip students with a better understanding of artificial intelligence and prepare them to adapt responsibly to evolving technological advancements.Caption: Resource person along with students of Beanstalk School during the AI workshop held in Dimapur on June 12.

title: Disney, Adobe, New York Times Among Members Of New AI Content Coalition Led By Netflix Alum Victoria Furniss
description: EXCLUSIVE: A new content-focused coalition, The Alliance for Responsible Innovation in the Arts & Media, has launched with Disney, the New York Times Co. and Adobe among its initial members. The new Los Angeles-based group says its mission is to “ensure that AI is developed and deployed responsibly, sustainably and for the betterment of all society.” [...]

title: ECMO technology is now becoming more effective with the help of AI
description: मरीज को ECMO पर कब और कितने समय रखें और कब हटाएं जैसे अहम निर्णयों में AI चिकित्सकों की कर रहा सहायता.

title: FT Alphaville’s AI Prediction World Cup
HCLTech backs Sarvam AI's unicorn leap; Consumer startups back in VC spotlight; and IT firms rethink AI strategy after Anthropic controversy
description: In today’s Tech3 from Moneycontrol, a major Moneycontrol scoop gets officially confirmed as Sarvam raises $234 million and enters the unicorn club at a $1.5 billion valuation. We unpack why Anthropic’s recent restrictions have reignited the sovereign AI debate and what it means for India’s AI ambitions. We also look at venture capital’s renewed interest in consumer startups, why IT firms are rethinking AI strategies after the Anthropic episode, and Razorpay’s confidential IPO filing as India’s startup listing pipeline continues to gather momentum.
